selectionReason: Authenticated read-only checks did not establish organization control of @mergora or control of the @akhiltrivedix scope. Every exact name in the approved unscoped tier returned npm registry E404, so the fixed selection algorithm chose that tier.

availabilityEvidence.preferredScopeEvidence: Package-level write access to the existing @mergora/gora package was observed, but npm organization and team control were unavailable. Package-level access does not establish control of the @mergora organization scope.
availabilityEvidence.publisherScopeEvidence: The @akhiltrivedix scope lookup returned npm E404; authenticated control was not established.
availabilityEvidence.similarityReview: The existing @mergora/gora package is a time-bound similarity observation. This evidence does not claim trademark, legal, or confusion clearance.
